examples: Then the woodcutter let his axe fly – Thwack! Everyone heard it.
He maintained that he was protecting himself from Mr. Cox, who came at him with an axe.
The edge of this axe has turned.
Fiat's American partner is also swinging the axe and praying for success with a new model.
The role of a virile, axe-wielding, fur-bearing, cranium-smashing barbarian suited Schwarzenegger to a tee.
